name: official_photogeneration_coupling_template
purpose: Guarded COMSOL Semiconductor plus optical-generation coupling template for a user-configured optoelectronic project.

generation_expression.name: <CONFIGURE_GENERATION_VARIABLE_NAME>
required_checks: Assign generation only to physically active domains.
Compare integrated generation with absorbed optical power or another conservation check.

notes: Feature and property keys for official COMSOL examples must be confirmed from the installed COMSOL version.
Use simplified source terms only for debugging unless the user explicitly validates them for the configured project.
Define bias polarity and operating region from the user's own device or system configuration.
